professionalSummary: Senior Full Stack Developer and Squad Lead with 7+ years of experience building data and AI products. Specialises in TypeScript, Python, and React across the full stack. Currently leading a team of 5 at Engine AI, where the Research Intelligence platform — a RAG and agent-based solution — serves 1,000+ users and processes 17,000 documents for a major client.

experience.position: Senior Full Stack Developer & Squad Lead
experience.description: Progressed from Junior Developer to Squad Lead over 5 years at Engine AI, a data insights startup. Owned the core platform from early-stage development through to leading a product squad delivering client-facing AI solutions.
achievements: Extended the Dashboard Engine — a React application that transforms JSON configuration into full-featured dashboards with a built-in design system — and built the backend API that feeds it configuration and data.
Built 5 high-fidelity prototypes for prospective clients, 2 of which converted into production engagements, demonstrating platform value with working software before contract signature.

Led a 5-engineer squad to build a production RAG and agent platform on OpenAI and Weaviate, processing 17,000 documents and serving 1,000+ users for a major client; introduced an LLM evaluation framework to systematically measure retrieval quality across releases.

experience.description: Joined via the JSchool programme — a merit-based entry track accessed through a hackathon — and converted to a full-time Frontend Developer. Worked primarily on internal tools connecting Latin American developers with US clients.
achievements: Built a library of 10+ reusable React components, documented and tested with Storybook, adopted across 2 internal products.
Delivered the full-stack platform managing 30+ employees across 10 client accounts, building both the React frontend using the component library and the NestJS backend.

details: Full merit scholarship awarded by the State
Thesis: Bottle image classification system using Convolutional Neural Networks
Equivalent to Masters in Computer Science (European standard)

strengths.title: Technically proficient
strengths.description: I can jump into a complex codebase or problem with limited context and figure it out. I ask the right questions, make informed decisions where I need to, and try not to let uncertainty become a blocker for the people around me.

strengths.title: Good communicator
strengths.description: I meet people where they are. I listen more than I talk, and I genuinely care about creating an environment where people feel safe being honest. That said, I know when the moment calls for clarity and I don't shy away from saying the important thing.

strengths.title: Design mindset
strengths.description: I love the craft of making something that just feels right to use. I work closely with design teams and I take the experience people have seriously — continuous iteration is how I get there. My favourite kind of design is the kind people don't notice.
